ai.label: AI & Agents
ai.query: "artificial intelligence" OR LLM OR "agent framework" OR Claude OR GPT OR "AI safety" OR "machine learning"
ai.s2: large language models, AI agents, AI alignment, reinforcement learning

devtools.label: Dev Tools & Infrastructure
devtools.query: "developer tools" OR DevOps OR "open source" OR Kubernetes OR "programming language" OR "cloud computing"
devtools.s2: software engineering, developer productivity, cloud infrastructure, programming languages

finserv.label: Financial Services
finserv.query: fintech OR "financial services" OR banking OR "capital markets" OR payments OR "financial regulation"
finserv.s2: financial technology, digital banking, payments systems, capital markets

science.label: Science
science.query: "scientific discovery" OR physics OR biology OR "climate science" OR "space exploration" OR "materials science"
science.arxiv: cat:physics.gen-ph OR cat:q-bio OR cat:astro-ph OR cat:cond-mat.mtrl-sci
science.s2: scientific discovery, climate science, materials science, space exploration

cogsci.label: Cognitive Science & Psychology
cogsci.query: neuroscience OR "cognitive science" OR psychology OR "decision making" OR "behavioral economics" OR consciousness
cogsci.s2: cognitive neuroscience, decision making, behavioral economics, consciousness

security.label: Cybersecurity
security.query: cybersecurity OR "data breach" OR vulnerability OR "threat intelligence" OR "application security" OR "supply chain attack"
security.s2: cybersecurity, vulnerability research, threat intelligence, supply chain security

systems.label: Systems & Complexity
systems.query: "systems thinking" OR cybernetics OR "complex systems" OR "organizational theory" OR emergence OR "feedback loops"
systems.s2: complex systems, cybernetics, emergence, multi-agent systems
